item.title: Japanese Parliament member explains the futility of appeasing the mad king
item.dc:creator: KinseyH

item.title: The Devastating Photographs of Edward Burtynsky
item.description:
Burtinsky is my favorite photographer. His decade spanning career focuses on the impact humans have had on their environment and his work is designed to be viewed in a much larger format than the constraints of an online gallery, but it's still impressive. This tire wasteland is in California.
Shipbreaking in Bangladesh.
Deep Sea oil rig fire
Dam across the Yangtze in China
My favorite series of his was the quarries. The geometry is very compelling.
Factory Workers
More Factory workers
Bangladesh again
Salt basins
Rag pickers among the bottles
Possibly my favorite of all his images. Huge and terrifying. For a sense of scale, there are four humans standing on the right hand side of the image along the top of the wall, just in front of the first tube.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: "Terrified" Cop abuses unarmed woman in school parking lot - tasering
item.description:
Cop uses legal wording to allow assault and tasering even though the legal wording of being concerned for his safety and terrified does not reflect the body camera footage https://medjournaldaily.com/michigan-cop-pulls-mother-out-of-car/

item.title: Raccoon Weekend plans
item.description: Raccoons are den animals, they choose to sleep in tight places. The pinned reel shows what he is sleeping in. He has an entire room and closet with larger drawers to sleep in but he chooses to sleep in this drawer because it is his den. He removes all pillows, towels, and cushions we place in there and he refuses to go to the chiropractor ? #whiteraccoon #trashpanda #petraccoons #raccoon #raccoons #funnyanimals #cuteanimals #Raccoonsofinstagram #raccoonpet #funnypets #cutepets #raccoonpets #pet #petraccoon #insomniac #funnyraccoons #spiritanimal #trashpandasofinstagram #raccoon #pets #introvert #ijustwanttosleep #sotired #sleep #relatable
item.dc:creator: SanctuaryVibes
